description: Defines which learning dimensions are active (actually wired to change output) vs inactive (computed but not consumed). Inactive dimensions are preserved in learning_state.json for future use but the updater will not compute weights for them.

archetype_weights.effect: Adds 0-20 priority boost to publish ordering based on learned archetype performance

faq_weights.effect: Reweights FAQ pool selection so higher-performing FAQ questions are more likely to be selected

title_pattern_weights.reason: Only one title template per page. No variant pool to select from.
title_pattern_weights.activate_when: Multiple title templates are added to lane-engine.js

meta_pattern_weights.reason: Only one meta description template per page. No variant pool.

cta_weights.reason: Only one CTA per page. No CTA variant pool exists.

intro_pattern_weights.reason: One intro template per archetype. No variant pool within archetypes.
intro_pattern_weights.activate_when: Multiple intro variants per archetype are added

link_pattern_weights.reason: Link selection is deterministic based on page relationships.

signal_confidence_levels.medium: Has GA4 data (quote_starts or sessions > 0) but no GSC
signal_confidence_levels.low: Internal signals only (AI score, publish success). Does NOT drive weight updates.
